{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/74800891?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/therawdev", "id": 74800891, "login": "therawdev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc0ODAwODkx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55884", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-306", "name": "Missing Authentication for Critical Function"}], "description": "## Summary
The Tilt HUD HTTP server exposes state-changing and sensitive-read endpoints with no authentication. When the HUD is bound to a non-loopback address, a network attacker can trigger the developer's pre-defined Tiltfile resources, tamper with Tiltfile arguments, read full engine state including the session token, and reach the Tilt apiserver through a token-attaching proxy.

## Details
The HUD server registers its handlers on a `gorilla/mux` router with no authenticating middleware. The `cookieWrapper` helper emits the `Tilt-Token` cookie but never validates it, and is attached only to the static-asset prefix.

## Impact
An unauthenticated network caller can force any developer-defined resource to run on the host as the `tilt` user (choosing which and when, not the command text), set arbitrary Tiltfile arguments, disclose the session token and full engine state, and invoke apiserver resources via the loopback-token proxy. Because `tilt up` runs with the developer's privileges and credentials, the impact reaches the developer's environment and cluster.

### Conditions for exploitation
- Affected version in `>= 0.20.8, <= 0.37.3`.
- HUD bound to a non-loopback address (`tilt up --host 0.0.0.0`, or `TILT_HOST` set).
- Network reachability to the listener (default port `10350`).

### Not affected
- The default loopback-only bind is not reachable from the network.

## Workarounds
Use the default loopback bind (omit `--host`, unset `TILT_HOST`) and ensure nothing else proxies to `localhost:10350`. No complete workaround short of upgrading for non-loopback deployments.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00397, "percentile": 0.31857}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T13:58:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55884"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T13:58:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/security/advisories/GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/pull/6776", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/releases/tag/v0.37.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tilt-dev/tilt/security-advisories/GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt", "summary": "Tilt: Missing authentication on the network-exposed Tilt HUD server", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T13:58:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c73q-8xxr-rgqm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.37.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/tilt-dev/tilt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.20.8, <= 0.37.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tilt: Missing authentication on the network-exposed Tilt HUD server
